name: RAG Q&A with Context
description: Answer a question using only the provided context (retrieved documents).

name: Multi-Document Synthesis
description: Synthesize information from multiple retrieved documents.

name: Source-Grounded Summary
description: Summarize retrieved documents with inline citations.
prompt:
Create a concise summary of the key information in the provided documents. Include inline citations like [1], [2] for each claim. Focus on factual accuracy — do not add interpretation.

{{documents}}
